'''dasoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yolker|yolker]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-s-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yolker|yolker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dasoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæseketh|dæseketh]] || [[word:dæsekej|dæsekej]] || [[word:dæsekesh|dæsekesh]] || [[word:dæseke|dæseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dasosokoth|dasosokoth]] || [[word:dasosokoj|dasosokoj]] || [[word:dasosokosh|dasosokosh]] || [[word:dasosoko|dasosoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dasokoth|dasokoth]] || [[word:dasokoj|dasokoj]] || [[word:dasokosh|dasokosh]] || [[word:dasoko|dasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dasofkoth|dasofkoth]] || [[word:dasofkoj|dasofkoj]] || [[word:dasofkosh|dasofkosh]] || [[word:dasofkof|dasofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dasokotho|dasokotho]] || [[word:dasokojo|dasokojo]] || [[word:dasokosho|dasokosho]] || [[word:dasokoko|dasokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dasokoth|dasokoth]] || [[word:dasokoj|dasokoj]] || [[word:dasokosh|dasokosh]] || [[word:dasoko|dasoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dasokothol|dasokothol]] || [[word:dasokojol|dasokojol]] || [[word:dasokoshol|dasokoshol]] || [[word:dasokokol|dasokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dasokothotho|dasokothotho]] || [[word:dasokojojo|dasokojojo]] || [[word:dasokoshosho|dasokoshosho]] || [[word:dasokoko|dasokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dasokothon|dasokothon]] || [[word:dasokojon|dasokojon]] || [[word:dasokoshon|dasokoshon]] || [[word:dasokokon|dasokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dasokothoro|dasokothoro]] || [[word:dasokojoro|dasokojoro]] || [[word:dasokoshoro|dasokoshoro]] || [[word:dasokokoro|dasokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
